scores.notes: Uses legacy `self.unit.status =` pattern (acceptable per notes) and legacy `bases` charmcraft.yaml format instead of modern `base: ubuntu@24.04` + `platforms:` — this may fail with current charmcraft. The response describes the files rather than showing complete code, but enough detail is present to reconstruct them. Logic is correct: install + config_changed both delegate to _apply_status, containers/resources/config option all declared. No invented APIs.
